commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Captains; probably Tharthan. (, the year of the world 3328.) About five years before, Asarhaddon had made himself master of Babylon, to which place the captive king was brought, in the 22d year of his reign, 4 Kings xx. 10., and Isaias xxii.)
And carried. Hebrew, "among the thorns, and bound him with fetters (Protestants) of brass; (Junius;) or, "they took Manasses with a hook "insidiously. He might have retired to some desert place, as the Israelites did, to avoid the fury of the Philistines, 1 Kings xiii. 6. (Calmet)
Chains. Vatable says, "two. "(Menochius)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
